actions.shotDescription: A woman leans in and pretends to bite her dog's paw, accompanied by a loud crunching sound effect.
A man is lying in bed with his dog. An off-screen person screams, startling the dog.

actions.text: Scare your dog to see their reaction...

actions.shotDescription: A person pretends to feed a small white dog with a spoon but then drops the spoon, making a loud noise and scaring the dog away.
A woman pretends to bite her dog's paw, and the dog makes a hilarious smiling/baring teeth expression.

actions.text: I pretended to take a bite out of my dog's paw and his reaction was hilarious...

actions.shotDescription: A person offers a piece of cabbage to a small dog instead of a treat from the bag, causing the dog to growl intensely.
A person on a couch makes a sudden noise, startling a small chihuahua next to them.
A man makes a spitting sound at his dog, and the dog reacts by playfully attacking him.
A dog approaches its doghouse, and a scary monster mask pops out, causing the dog to leap back in fear and run away.
A corgi lying on the floor reacts to a fart sound effect with a dramatic side-eye.
A dog sitting at a table is shown a tiny toy burger instead of a real one, and it growls in disappointment.
A dog lying on its back has its ball taken away, and it freezes with a shocked expression.
A woman with a dog resting on her shoulders suddenly barks loudly, startling the dog.
A person puts a single piece of kibble in a small dog's bowl. After eating it, the dog frantically runs around.
A golden retriever reacts to a long fake fart sound with a very sad and confused look.
A sleeping labrador is woken up by a smaller dog wearing a scary monster mask, causing the labrador to panic and crash into a cabinet.
A bulldog sleeping on its owner's stomach is woken by a fart sound and gives an annoyed look.
A dog hears a fake bark sound, looks around confused, and then barks back.
A person crinkles a plastic water bottle on a sleeping dog's stomach, causing it to jump up in fright.
A person snatches a treat off a dog's nose and pretends to eat it, leaving the dog looking betrayed.
A person pretends to give a dog a treat but reveals an empty hand, making the dog angry.
A man tries to scare his dog with a monster pose, but the dog slips and falls while trying to escape.
A man hiding behind a couch jumps out to scare his two dogs as they run into the room.
A person in a werewolf mask jumps out at a dog in a hallway, scaring it.
A person makes a loud noise to startle several pitbulls sleeping in the sun.
A man pretends to eat his dog's leg, and the dog gives him an annoyed side-eye.
A bulldog on a couch farts, causing the woman lying next to it to recoil in disgust.
A labrador lying at a person's feet is startled by a fart sound and begins barking.

structure.openingShot: A woman pretends to bite her dog's paw, eliciting a funny reaction, setting the 'prank' theme.
structure.endingShot: A labrador reacts angrily to a fart sound, ending the compilation on a high-energy, funny note.
